---
title: "Metainformation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{initialise_a_ts_archive"}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
<!-- TODO: check if this does global eval = FALSE -->
```{r include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE
)
```

This site explains how to add data descriptions to your time series archive and in meanigful and efficient fashion.
